name: Baltimore Peach Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. With an electric mixer, blend the first five ingredients until smooth.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 15x10-inch jelly roll pan or a 13x9-inch plus one 8-inch cake pan.
4. Sprinkle half of the cinnamon/sugar mixture lightly over the base of the batter.
5. Arrange peach slices in rows on top of the base.
6. Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon/sugar mixture and drizzle the melted butter over the peaches.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes. If the dough is thick, omit the 8-inch cake pan and use only the 13x9-inch pan.
